worker_tasks.task_scope: Verify stability of class-conditioned distribution shifts in backward packet length features across different time windows and network conditions using evidence refs e10 to e12.
stop_conditions: distribution shifts characterized for all relevant time windows
stability assessment completed across network conditions

worker_tasks.task_scope: Compare variance ratios and unique value counts of backward packet length features between classes to identify structural differences using evidence refs e10 to e12.
stop_conditions: variance ratios computed for all classes
unique value counts compared across classes

worker_tasks.task_scope: Assess risk of overfitting by detecting dataset-specific artifacts and shortcut-like signals in backward packet length features using evidence refs e10 to e12.
stop_conditions: shortcut signals identified or ruled out

worker_tasks.task_scope: Evaluate potential for reliable class discrimination based on structural variations in backward packet length features under varying conditions using evidence refs e10 to e12.
